title: Contact Emily – Emily Darlington MP
meta_description: As your elected representative, I’m here to represent your interests. I encourage local residents to get in touch and share their concerns or challenges. While I do my best to respond to everyone, I prioritise urgent casework and specific questions over mass campaign emails - but I will always reply. You can get in touch…
text_excerpt: Contact Emily – Emily Darlington MP Emily Darlington MP Championing a Fairer, Greener, and Brighter Future for Milton Keynes Central About Emily How Is Emily Working for you? Weekly Newsletter News & Views Online Safety Act Campaign – Survey Results Useful Resources Contact Emily Surgery Appointments Data Protection and Privacy Policy Contact Emily As your elected representative, I’m here to represent your interests. I encourage local residents to get in touch and share their concerns or challenges. While I do my best to respond to everyone, I prioritise urgent casework and specific questions over mass campaign emails – but I will always reply. You can get in touch by filling out the form below, emailing emily.darlington.mp@parliament.uk , or calling my office on 07748808468. ← Back Thank you for your response. ✨ Full Name (required) Address (required) Email (required) Message (required) Send Submitting form Δ Stay in the loop! Facebook X Instagram TikTok YouTube Bluesky LinkedIn Email: emily.darlington.mp@parliament.uk Office Phone: 07748808468 Subscribe Subscribe to get my the latest updates in your inbox. Type your email… Subscribe
